evidence_notes: Actual repaired SVGs were read from pipeline/iconforge/assets/svg/owned_repair_batch54/ in the detached copy.

Candidate day/dusk/night renders and OpenCPN reference renders were read from /private/tmp/helm-forge14/pipeline/iconforge/out because ignored render artifacts are not tracked in the clean detached copy.
Vertical COLPAT2 rows fail when the after SVG uses stacked horizontal bands instead of vertical stripes, even if the colour tokens are present.

Special-purpose simplified rows with empty required_colours were checked against OpenCPN/S-101/AquaMap witnesses and prior judge text; white default bodies were not accepted when the reference cue is yellow.
Passes are judge_pass_pending_final_approval only and grant zero final approvals.

selection.pass_semantics: pass-pending-human only; this artifact grants zero final approvals
selection.selection_note: Judged owned_repair_batch54 against full row metadata, semantic_brief, S-57 shape/color conditions, source/provider references, before/after SVGs, prior judge feedback, and available source-worktree before/after/OpenCPN renders. BOYLAT26/27 were intentionally absent from this selected batch due the class-reference-only exact-crop safety gate.
